caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Cozumel
caribbean.paragraph: Cozumel is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 3.1 ft, while St. Lucia has a less intense system with winds of 11 kt. I expect the Western Caribbean to bear the brunt of this weather system, with Cozumel being the most impacted port due to the high rain probability and moderate winds.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing max winds of 23 kt and wave heights of 4.9 ft with less than 10% rain probability, while Dubrovnik has max winds of 16 kt, making for a relatively calm day in the Central Mediterranean, with Mykonos being the top impact port in the region.
